title: FCDO annual report and accounts 2024 to 2025
body: "The Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) annual report and accounts provides detail on the activities of the FCDO during financial year 2024 to 2025.  The report consists of:   a performance report an accountability report financial statements   The financial statements and certain sections of the accountability report are audited by the National Audit Office before they are presented to Parliament.   The report was laid in Parliament on 22 July 2025.   "
